ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the course (e.g., MA404) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the course was last updated */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "hired_at" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member was hired */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the section belongs to */,
  "section_number" INTEGER /* Section number (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the section is offered in (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the section is offered in */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "current_students" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the section */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the section (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the section was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the section was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the schedule entry belongs to */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the schedule entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the schedule entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the faculty member (e.g., lecturer, teaching assistant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_roles_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_roles_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the student record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is enrolled in */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date when the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES course_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_faculties" (
  "course_faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-faculty entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculties_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculties_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sections_faculties" (
  "section_faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section-faculty entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_faculties_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES course_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_faculties_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., super admin, department admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the administrator is responsible for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the administrator record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the administrator record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrators_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the section */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade of the students in the section */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_load" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load entry */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the faculty member is teaching */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the load entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the load entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view courses, edit courses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
